TPT, SF*T fff^ MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th February, 1991 G.S.R. 96(E),—In exercise of the powers conferred by Clause (a) ot sec- tion 9 of the Prevention of Ulicit Traffic in Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act, 1988 (46 of 1988); and in supersession of the notification of tlie Government of India in the Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) No. G.S.R. 716(E) dated 26th July, 1989 the Central Government hereby constitutes an Advisory Board consisting ol : CHAIRMAN 1. Hon'ble Mr. Justice D. P. Wadhwa, Judge of the Delhi High Court. MEMBERS 2. Hon'ble Mr, Justice M. L. Jain, Retired Judge of the Delhi High Court. 3. Hon'ble Mr. Justice N. N. Goswamy, Retired Judge of the Delhi High Court. [F. No. 820|1|91-PITNDPS] A. K. ROY, Under Secy.
